    intro e he f hf hne
    apply h_match.disjoint
    · exact h_edges he
    · exact h_edges hf
    · exact hne
  have h_len_odd : Odd P.length := by
    cases' hP with x e Q
    · simp_all
    induction Q using WList.induction_on with
    | nil => simp_all
    | cons y f R ih =>
      simp_all [WList.length, Nat.odd_add, Nat.odd_one]
  have h_symm_diff : (M ∆ E(P)).encard = M.encard + E(P).encard - 2 * (M ∩ E(P)).encard := by
    rw [symmDiff_encard, add_comm]
  have h_inter : (M ∩ E(P)).encard = (E(P).encard - 1) / 2 := by
    have h_chain : List.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∈ M ↔ f ∉ M) P.edge := h_alt
    have h_start : P.edge.head! ∉ M := by
      intro h_mem
      have h_inc : P.first ∈ V(G, P.edge.head!) := by
        cases' P with x
        · contradiction
        cases' P.tail with y
        · simp_all
        simp_all [WList.first, WList.edge, List.head!]
      have h_covered : P.first ∈ V(G, M) := by
        apply Set.mem_of_mem_of_subset h_mem
        simp [V]
      contradiction
    have h_count : (M ∩ E(P)).encard = (P.length - 1) / 2 := by
      clear h_start
      induction P using WList.induction_on with
      | nil => simp_all
      | cons x e Q ih =>
        cases' Q with y
        · simp_all
        simp_all [WList.length, Nat.div_eq_of_lt, Nat.succ_le_succ_iff]
        have h_e_not_in : e ∉ M := by
          intro h_mem
          have h_inc : x ∈ V(G, e) := by
            apply WList.edge_inc_left
            exact h_path.toIsTrail
          have h_covered : x ∈ V(G, M) := by
            apply Set.mem_of_mem_of_subset h_mem
            simp [V]
          contradiction
        have h_f_in : Q.edge.head! ∈ M := by
          have h_chain_cons : e ∈ M ↔ Q.edge.head! ∉ M := by
            apply h_chain.head_cons
          simp_all
        simp_all [Nat.succ_sub_succ_eq_sub, Nat.div_eq_of_lt]
    simp_all [WList.length_eq_encard_edge]
  have h_encard : E(P).encard = P.length := by
    rw [← WList.length_eq_encard_edge]
  rw [h_symm_diff, h_encard, h_inter]
  omega

have h_alt : P.edge.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∈ M ↔ f ∉ M) := h.toIsAltPath.mem_matching_iff
  have h_nonempty : P.Nonempty := h.nonempty
  have h_first : P.first ∉ V(G, M) := h.first_not_in
  have h_last : P.last ∉ V(G, M) := h.last_not_in
  have h_path : G.IsPath P := h.toIsAltPath.toIsPath
  have h_trail : G.IsTrail P := h_path.isTrail
  have h_nodup : P.edge.Nodup := h_trail.edge_nodup
  have h_odd : Odd P.edge.length := by
    cases' P with u
    · contradiction
    · induction P with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons u e P ih =>
        cases' P with v
        · simp_all [WList.edge]
        · have := h_alt
          simp_all [WList.edge, List.isChain_cons_cons]
  rw [symmDiff_encard_eq_add_sub (M := M) (N := E(P)), add_comm]
  have h_disj : Disjoint (M \ E(P)) (E(P) \ M) := by
    apply Set.disjoint_diff_diff
  have h_inter : (M ∩ E(P)).encard = (E(P) \ M).encard - 1 := by
    cases' P with u
    · contradiction
    · induction P with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons u e P ih =>
        cases' P with v
        · simp_all [WList.edge]
        · simp_all [WList.edge, List.isChain_cons_cons]
  omega

have hP := h.toIsAltPath
  have hodd : Odd P.edge.length := by
    have := hP.mem_matching_iff
    cases P with
    | nil x => simp_all
    | cons x e P' =>
      cases P' with
      | nil y => simp_all
      | cons y f P'' =>
        simp_all [List.isChain_cons_cons]
        omega
  rw [symmDiff_encard_add, add_comm]
  have hdisj : Disjoint (M \ E(P)) (E(P) \ M) := by
    apply Disjoint.symm
    apply Disjoint.diff_right
  rw [← encard_union_eq_add hdisj]
  have heq : (M ∩ E(P)).encard = (E(P) \ M).encard - 1 := by
    have hmatch := hP.mem_matching_iff
    cases P with
    | nil x => simp_all
    | cons x e P' =>
      cases P' with
      | nil y => simp_all
      | cons y f P'' =>
        simp_all [List.isChain_cons_cons]
        omega
  omega

have hP : P.Nonempty := h.nonempty
  have h_alt : G.IsAltPath hM P := h.toIsAltPath
  have h_ends : P.first ∉ V(G, M) ∧ P.last ∉ V(G, M) := ⟨h.first_not_in, h.last_not_in⟩
  have h_chain : P.edge.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∈ M ↔ f ∉ M) := h_alt.mem_matching_iff
  have h_path : G.IsPath P := h_alt.toIsPath
  have h_trail : G.IsTrail P := h_path.isTrail
  have h_nodup : P.edge.Nodup := h_trail.edge_nodup
  have h_odd : Odd P.edge.length := by
    cases' P with x
    · contradiction
    cases' x with u e w
    · simp_all
    have : P.edge.length = List.length (e :: w.edge) := rfl
    simp_all [List.length]
    exact Nat.odd_iff_not_even.mpr fun ⟨k, hk⟩ => by
      have : (e :: w.edge).length = 2 * k := by rw [hk]
      clear hk
      induction' k with k ih
      · simp_all
      · simp_all [Nat.mul_succ]
  rw [symmDiff_encard_eq_add_sub (hM.subset.trans (by rintro e he; exact he.1))
      (by rintro e he; exact he.1)]
  have h_inter : (M ∩ E(P)).encard = (P.edge.length - 1) / 2 := by
    cases' P with x
    · contradiction
    cases' x with u e w
    · simp_all
    have : P.edge = e :: w.edge := rfl
    simp_all
    have : (e :: w.edge).Nodup := h_nodup
    have : (e :: w.edge).IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∈ M ↔ f ∉ M) := h_chain
    have : e ∉ M := by
      intro heM
      have : u ∈ V(G, M) := ⟨e, heM, (h_path.toWEdge.mem_iff.mp (by simp)).1⟩
      contradiction
    simp_all
    induction' w.edge with f l ih
    · simp_all
    · simp_all
      have : f ∈ M := by
        have : e ∉ M := by assumption
        have : e ∈ M ↔ f ∉ M := by simpa using this
        simp_all
      have : l.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∈ M ↔ f ∉ M) := by simpa using this
      have : l.Nodup := by simpa using this
      simp_all
      omega
  have h_union : (M ∪ E(P)).encard = M.encard + E(P).encard - (M ∩ E(P)).encard := by
    rw [encard_union]
    exact hM.subset.trans (by rintro e he; exact he.1)
    exact by rintro e he; exact he.1
  rw [h_union, h_inter]
  have h_EP : E(P).encard = P.edge.length := by
    rw [eSet_eq_edgeSet]
    exact h_nodup.encard_eq_length
  rw [h_EP]
  have : P.edge.length = 2 * ((P.edge.length - 1) / 2) + 1 := by
    rw [Nat.two_mul]
    omega
  omega
